items.title: Mexico sends thousands of soldiers to stop violence after death of drug lord
items.description: A wave of violence has erupted across Mexico since a powerful drug cartel boss died following his capture by special forces.

items.title: Queen tells Gisèle Pelicot her new memoir left her 'speechless'
items.description: Camilla praised the French rape survivor over tea at her Clarence House residence in London.

items.title: Lord Mandelson arrest - how did we get here?
items.description: It comes after the ex-Labour minister was accused of passing sensitive government information to Jeffrey Epstein.

items.title: Italian cricket in crisis amid sexual assault allegation
items.description: Italian cricket is in crisis days after the country's World Cup debut as it deals with an allegation of sexual assault by a senior figure within the n...

items.title: 'Burned and destroyed': Locals and tourists describe Mexico unrest
items.description: Violence has erupted across several states in Mexico after cartel leader El Mencho was killed on Sunday.
